cleavage agent: the ECM proteins were then digested into peptides using a trypsin/Lys-C protease mixture
instrument: quantification using the Q Exactive Plus Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: ionization was facilitated by an NSI system
labeling: the expression levels of each target gene normalized to that of the housekeeping gene (GAPDH) and calculated using the 2−ΔΔCT method.
